summary:
Children with germline retinoblandomia inherit a defective RB1 gene, increasing their lifelong risk for multiple secondary cancers due to impaired tumor suppression. Osteosarcoma is the most commonly recognized additional malignant condition linked to this genetic predisposition among available choices.  

Note: There appears to be an error in one word—"retinoblantoma"—should correctly read “retinoblastoma.”

Final Answer: \boxed{\text{Osteosarcoma}}
